records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Where do you think you're going?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Where do you think you're going?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Where do you think you're going?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? You're gonna follow me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? You're gonna follow me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? You're gonna follow me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Duh! I still have unfinished business with you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Duh! I still have unfinished business with you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Duh! I still have unfinished business with you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah, you're so stubborn. Did ya forget that you entered the top ranks because I helped ya defeat Knight?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah, you're so stubborn. Did ya forget that you entered the top ranks because I helped ya defeat Knight?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah, you're so stubborn. Did ya forget that you entered the top ranks because I helped ya defeat Knight?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not true! I made it all the way here by myself!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not true! I made it all the way here by myself!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not true! I made it all the way here by myself!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Geez. If the trio didn't apologize for ya, you would've been toast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Geez. If the trio didn't apologize for ya, you would've been toast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Geez. If the trio didn't apologize for ya, you would've been toast.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't need to apologize! I'm not afraid of them!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't need to apologize! I'm not afraid of them!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't need to apologize! I'm not afraid of them!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Didn't ya feel something odd when you were fightin' them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Didn't ya feel something odd when you were fightin' them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Didn't ya feel something odd when you were fightin' them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even with the power of the Artifact... don't ya think it was a little too strong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even with the power of the Artifact... don't ya think it was a little too strong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even with the power of the Artifact... don't ya think it was a little too strong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-come to think of it... it did feel like they were cheating in a way...
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-come to think of it... it did feel like they were cheating in a way...
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-come to think of it... it did feel like they were cheating in a way...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't seem to shake that feelin' off. Guess I can't just fool around like the ol' days anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't seem to shake that feelin' off. Guess I can't just fool around like the ol' days anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't seem to shake that feelin' off. Guess I can't just fool around like the ol' days anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I've been meaning to ask, but who are you really?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I've been meaning to ask, but who are you really?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I've been meaning to ask, but who are you really?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Why do ya wanna know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Why do ya wanna know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Why do ya wanna know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I first saw you, I thought you were around my age.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I first saw you, I thought you were around my age.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I first saw you, I thought you were around my age.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you talk to me and treat me as if I'm a child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you talk to me and treat me as if I'm a child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you talk to me and treat me as if I'm a child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So tell me. Who are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So tell me. Who are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So tell me. Who are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ya really wanna know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ya really wanna know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ya really wanna know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are ya certain... ya won't regret it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are ya certain... ya won't regret it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are ya certain... ya won't regret it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you think that's going to scare me off?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you think that's going to scare me off?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you think that's going to scare me off?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aight. Follow me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aight. Follow me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aight. Follow me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what's she going to say...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what's she going to say...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what's she going to say...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah! It was a huge deal back then!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah! It was a huge deal back then!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah! It was a huge deal back then!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I poured alcohol on Dain's head as a joke, and it was the first time I ever saw her that angry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I poured alcohol on Dain's head as a joke, and it was the first time I ever saw her that angry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I poured alcohol on Dain's head as a joke, and it was the first time I ever saw her that angry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do ya know what she said to me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do ya know what she said to me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do ya know what she said to me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Fu fuu, Rinae. I think I'll have to make you listen to sparrows chirping all day to fix that nasty drunken behavior of yours."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Fu fuu, Rinae. I think I'll have to make you listen to sparrows chirping all day to fix that nasty drunken behavior of yours."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Fu fuu, Rinae. I think I'll have to make you listen to sparrows chirping all day to fix that nasty drunken behavior of yours."

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Th-then, Bora said
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Th-then, Bora said
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Th-then, Bora said
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Apologize... Rinae."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Apologize... Rinae."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Apologize... Rinae."

records.m_Talk_ENG: "You went... too far."
records.m_Talk_DEU: "You went... too far."
records.m_Talk_FRA: "You went... too far."

records.m_Talk_ENG: A ha ha ha ha!! I sounded just like her right now, didn't I?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A ha ha ha ha!! I sounded just like her right now, didn't I?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A ha ha ha ha!! I sounded just like her right now, didn't I?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... I lost track of time talkin' about the good ol' times.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... I lost track of time talkin' about the good ol' times.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... I lost track of time talkin' about the good ol' times.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right... What were we talkin' about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right... What were we talkin' about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right... What were we talkin' about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you kidding me?! I thought you were going to say something serious!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you kidding me?! I thought you were going to say something serious!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you kidding me?! I thought you were going to say something serious!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How much longer are you going to drag this out?! Now, tell me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How much longer are you going to drag this out?! Now, tell me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How much longer are you going to drag this out?! Now, tell me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ya know, it's kinda hard to describe who I am in one word. Um...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ya know, it's kinda hard to describe who I am in one word. Um...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ya know, it's kinda hard to describe who I am in one word. Um...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How 'bout, "the best Artifact collector, Mi Rinaej[Treasure Hunter!"
records.m_Talk_DEU: How 'bout, "the best Artifact collector, Mi Rinaej[Treasure Hunter!"
records.m_Talk_FRA: How 'bout, "the best Artifact collector, Mi Rinaej[Treasure Hunter!"

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I see that you never intended on telling me in the first place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I see that you never intended on telling me in the first place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I see that you never intended on telling me in the first place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ain't that enough? You'll only get hurt if ya try to find out more 'bout me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ain't that enough? You'll only get hurt if ya try to find out more 'bout me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ain't that enough? You'll only get hurt if ya try to find out more 'bout me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An Artifact that reflects one's admiration... Sure, it sounds like a great object.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An Artifact that reflects one's admiration... Sure, it sounds like a great object.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An Artifact that reflects one's admiration... Sure, it sounds like a great object.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But an Artifact ain't omnipotent. It's always accompanied with side effects.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But an Artifact ain't omnipotent. It's always accompanied with side effects.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But an Artifact ain't omnipotent. It's always accompanied with side effects.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Side effects? Is that why those idiots acted so strangely?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Side effects? Is that why those idiots acted so strangely?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Side effects? Is that why those idiots acted so strangely?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not just them. I've seen a few who couldn't even tell reality apart.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not just them. I've seen a few who couldn't even tell reality apart.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not just them. I've seen a few who couldn't even tell reality apart.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: An admiration toward Counters. This never ended well since the Elixir incident.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An admiration toward Counters. This never ended well since the Elixir incident.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An admiration toward Counters. This never ended well since the Elixir incident.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even with the Artifact's power, non-Counters can't understand the power of Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even with the Artifact's power, non-Counters can't understand the power of Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even with the Artifact's power, non-Counters can't understand the power of Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They'll surely have an unconscious manifestation of CRF, and if that happens...
records.m_Talk_DEU: They'll surely have an unconscious manifestation of CRF, and if that happens...
records.m_Talk_FRA: They'll surely have an unconscious manifestation of CRF, and if that happens...

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Well, problems like this happen 'cause we ain't got no safety measures.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Well, problems like this happen 'cause we ain't got no safety measures.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Well, problems like this happen 'cause we ain't got no safety measures.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can't they just shut down the server or kick the players out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can't they just shut down the server or kick the players out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can't they just shut down the server or kick the players out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... There's more red tape than that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... There's more red tape than that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... There's more red tape than that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? So, they're going to take the risk because of some bureaucracy?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? So, they're going to take the risk because of some bureaucracy?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? So, they're going to take the risk because of some bureaucracy?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just sayin', other issues might occur when shutting down a system that's synced to an Artifact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just sayin', other issues might occur when shutting down a system that's synced to an Artifact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just sayin', other issues might occur when shutting down a system that's synced to an Artifact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One wrong decision could lead to another catastrophe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One wrong decision could lead to another catastrophe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One wrong decision could lead to another catastrophe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle, I heard from Bora that ya want to become a hero.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle, I heard from Bora that ya want to become a hero.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle, I heard from Bora that ya want to become a hero.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could ya... tell me why you wanna become one?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could ya... tell me why you wanna become one?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could ya... tell me why you wanna become one?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why are you suddenly asking me that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why are you suddenly asking me that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why are you suddenly asking me that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. I'm very affectionate toward Academy students.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. I'm very affectionate toward Academy students.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. I'm very affectionate toward Academy students.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This costume I'm wearin' now, Dain actually designed this for me when we were young.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This costume I'm wearin' now, Dain actually designed this for me when we were young.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This costume I'm wearin' now, Dain actually designed this for me when we were young.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heroj[Starlight! I used to admire heroes like ya too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heroj[Starlight! I used to admire heroes like ya too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heroj[Starlight! I used to admire heroes like ya too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. What kind of hero wears that skimpy outfit?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. What kind of hero wears that skimpy outfit?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. What kind of hero wears that skimpy outfit?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shouldn't a hero wear something more elegant and dignified?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shouldn't a hero wear something more elegant and dignified?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shouldn't a hero wear something more elegant and dignified?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah, you're right 'bout that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah, you're right 'bout that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah, you're right 'bout that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, do ya wanna be a hero 'cause it looks cool?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, do ya wanna be a hero 'cause it looks cool?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, do ya wanna be a hero 'cause it looks cool?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course! That's what Counters are supposed to be!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course! That's what Counters are supposed to be!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course! That's what Counters are supposed to be!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I want to be the strongest hero! Won't it be cool if people looked up to me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I want to be the strongest hero! Won't it be cool if people looked up to me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I want to be the strongest hero! Won't it be cool if people looked up to me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just wait and see. I'll show you what a true hero looks like after I graduate!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just wait and see. I'll show you what a true hero looks like after I graduate!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just wait and see. I'll show you what a true hero looks like after I graduate!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I can't just tell ya 'cause I dunno everythin' 'bout ya,
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I can't just tell ya 'cause I dunno everythin' 'bout ya,
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I can't just tell ya 'cause I dunno everythin' 'bout ya,

records.m_Talk_ENG: but heroes are always fated to risk their lives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: but heroes are always fated to risk their lives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: but heroes are always fated to risk their lives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter the danger. Do ya still wanna be one?
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter the danger. Do ya still wanna be one?
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter the danger. Do ya still wanna be one?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Are you trying to say I'm wrong to admire heroes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Are you trying to say I'm wrong to admire heroes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Are you trying to say I'm wrong to admire heroes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no, nothing like that. I just...
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no, nothing like that. I just...
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no, nothing like that. I just...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ah hah hah. Guess the subject got too heavy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ah hah hah. Guess the subject got too heavy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ah hah hah. Guess the subject got too heavy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah... I'm sure it'll be possible for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah... I'm sure it'll be possible for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah... I'm sure it'll be possible for you.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Ya know, it's kinda hard to describe who I am in one word. Um...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ya know, it's kinda hard to describe who I am in one word. Um...

root.m_Talk_ENG: How 'bout, "the best Artifact collector, Mi Rinaej[Treasure Hunter!"
root.m_Talk_DEU: How 'bout, "the best Artifact collector, Mi Rinaej[Treasure Hunter!"
root.m_Talk_FRA: How 'bout, "the best Artifact collector, Mi Rinaej[Treasure Hunter!"

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I see that you never intended on telling me in the first place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I see that you never intended on telling me in the first place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I see that you never intended on telling me in the first place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ain't that enough? You'll only get hurt if ya try to find out more 'bout me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ain't that enough? You'll only get hurt if ya try to find out more 'bout me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ain't that enough? You'll only get hurt if ya try to find out more 'bout me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An Artifact that reflects one's admiration... Sure, it sounds like a great object.
root.m_Talk_DEU: An Artifact that reflects one's admiration... Sure, it sounds like a great object.
root.m_Talk_FRA: An Artifact that reflects one's admiration... Sure, it sounds like a great object.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But an Artifact ain't omnipotent. It's always accompanied with side effects.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But an Artifact ain't omnipotent. It's always accompanied with side effects.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But an Artifact ain't omnipotent. It's always accompanied with side effects.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Side effects? Is that why those idiots acted so strangely?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Side effects? Is that why those idiots acted so strangely?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Side effects? Is that why those idiots acted so strangely?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not just them. I've seen a few who couldn't even tell reality apart.94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not just them. I've seen a few who couldn't even tell reality apart.94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not just them. I've seen a few who couldn't even tell reality apart.94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: An admiration toward Counters. This never ended well since the Elixir incident.
root.m_Talk_DEU: An admiration toward Counters. This never ended well since the Elixir incident.
root.m_Talk_FRA: An admiration toward Counters. This never ended well since the Elixir incident.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even with the Artifact's power, non-Counters can't understand the power of Counters.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even with the Artifact's power, non-Counters can't understand the power of Counters.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even with the Artifact's power, non-Counters can't understand the power of Counters.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They'll surely have an unconscious manifestation of CRF, and if that happens...
root.m_Talk_DEU: They'll surely have an unconscious manifestation of CRF, and if that happens...
root.m_Talk_FRA: They'll surely have an unconscious manifestation of CRF, and if that happens...

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Well, problems like this happen 'cause we ain't got no safety measures.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Well, problems like this happen 'cause we ain't got no safety measures.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Well, problems like this happen 'cause we ain't got no safety measures.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can't they just shut down the server or kick the players out?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can't they just shut down the server or kick the players out?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can't they just shut down the server or kick the players out?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well... There's more red tape than that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well... There's more red tape than that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well... There's more red tape than that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? So, they're going to take the risk because of some bureaucracy?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? So, they're going to take the risk because of some bureaucracy?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? So, they're going to take the risk because of some bureaucracy?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just sayin', other issues might occur when shutting down a system that's synced to an Artifact.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just sayin', other issues might occur when shutting down a system that's synced to an Artifact.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just sayin', other issues might occur when shutting down a system that's synced to an Artifact.

root.m_Talk_ENG: One wrong decision could lead to another catastrophe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: One wrong decision could lead to another catastrophe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: One wrong decision could lead to another catastrophe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Naielle, I heard from Bora that ya want to become a hero.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Naielle, I heard from Bora that ya want to become a hero.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Naielle, I heard from Bora that ya want to become a hero.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could ya... tell me why you wanna become one?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could ya... tell me why you wanna become one?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could ya... tell me why you wanna become one?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Why are you suddenly asking me that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Why are you suddenly asking me that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Why are you suddenly asking me that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. I'm very affectionate toward Academy students.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. I'm very affectionate toward Academy students.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. I'm very affectionate toward Academy students.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This costume I'm wearin' now, Dain actually designed this for me when we were young.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This costume I'm wearin' now, Dain actually designed this for me when we were young.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This costume I'm wearin' now, Dain actually designed this for me when we were young.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Heroj[Starlight! I used to admire heroes like ya too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Heroj[Starlight! I used to admire heroes like ya too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Heroj[Starlight! I used to admire heroes like ya too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. What kind of hero wears that skimpy outfit?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. What kind of hero wears that skimpy outfit?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. What kind of hero wears that skimpy outfit?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shouldn't a hero wear something more elegant and dignified?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shouldn't a hero wear something more elegant and dignified?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shouldn't a hero wear something more elegant and dignified?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah, you're right 'bout that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah, you're right 'bout that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah, you're right 'bout that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, do ya wanna be a hero 'cause it looks cool?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, do ya wanna be a hero 'cause it looks cool?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, do ya wanna be a hero 'cause it looks cool?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course! That's what Counters are supposed to be!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course! That's what Counters are supposed to be!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course! That's what Counters are supposed to be!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I want to be the strongest hero! Won't it be cool if people looked up to me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I want to be the strongest hero! Won't it be cool if people looked up to me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I want to be the strongest hero! Won't it be cool if people looked up to me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just wait and see. I'll show you what a true hero looks like after I graduate!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just wait and see. I'll show you what a true hero looks like after I graduate!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just wait and see. I'll show you what a true hero looks like after I graduate!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I can't just tell ya 'cause I dunno everythin' 'bout ya,
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I can't just tell ya 'cause I dunno everythin' 'bout ya,
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I can't just tell ya 'cause I dunno everythin' 'bout ya,

root.m_Talk_ENG: but heroes are always fated to risk their lives.
root.m_Talk_DEU: but heroes are always fated to risk their lives.
root.m_Talk_FRA: but heroes are always fated to risk their lives.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter the danger. Do ya still wanna be one?
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter the danger. Do ya still wanna be one?
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter the danger. Do ya still wanna be one?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Are you trying to say I'm wrong to admire heroes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Are you trying to say I'm wrong to admire heroes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Are you trying to say I'm wrong to admire heroes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no, nothing like that. I just...
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no, nothing like that. I just...
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no, nothing like that. I just...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ah hah hah. Guess the subject got too heavy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ah hah hah. Guess the subject got too heavy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ah hah hah. Guess the subject got too heavy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah... I'm sure it'll be possible for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah... I'm sure it'll be possible for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah... I'm sure it'll be possible for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Unlike me...</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Unlike me...</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Unlike me...</color>
